title: Mattcy PvP
description: A texture pack for mace PvP themed around the orange color, it changes almost all texture for pvp (all netherite, diamonds item) the mace golden apples and elytra it also includes changes to armor perfect for ppl that like the Color Orange And Mace PvP
body: A texture pack for mace PvP themed around the orange color, it changes almost all texture for pvp (all netherite, diamonds item) the mace golden apples and elytra it also includes changes to armor perfect for ppl that like the Color Orange And Mace PvP
